1. Spirit AeroSystems Holdings, Inc. (SPR)

Aerospace & Defense · $5.9bn

Large Enterprise (>$3B) Aerospace & Defense

HIGH
 

Spirit reports forward losses driven by supply chain cost growth across Boeing 787, Airbus A350, and A220 programs

SEC Form 8-K

KPIs — FY2025

SEC Form 8-K Q2 2025 and Q3 2025 reports, August 5, 2025 and October 31, 2025

Limited public data
  

Key Issues

Net forward losses across programs

$798m in first 3 quarters 2025

Capabilities Needed

Program Portfolio OptimizationCost-to-Serve AnalyticsScenario Planning

Excess capacity costs production inefficiency

$119m in first 3 quarters 2025

Capabilities Needed

Capacity PlanningNetwork OptimizationDemand-Supply Matching

Operating losses and cash burn

$487m operating loss Q1 2025

Capabilities Needed

Working Capital OptimizationCash Flow ForecastingS&OP Integration
WC: $250mInv: -15%Margin: +400bps

Where the value lies

With $798m in net forward losses and $119m excess capacity costs across Q1-Q3 2025, Spirit faces material margin recovery opportunity of 400+ bps through better demand-supply planning, supplier collaboration, and program portfolio optimization. Post-Boeing acquisition integration creates urgent need for unified planning platform to synchronize production rates, reduce excess capacity, and improve cash conversion from negative $420m quarterly burn.

Accenture Solutions

Planning Opportunities

Implement integrated S&OP to synchronize production rates across Boeing programs, eliminate $119m excess capacity costs, and improve supplier collaboration to reduce $798m forward loss exposure.

Target Operating Model

Platform Opportunities

Kinaxis RapidResponse enables real-time concurrent planning across multi-tier aerospace supply chain, critical for managing fragile supplier network and accommodating production rate changes across 737/787/767/777 programs.

Planning Platform Reinvention

👥 Similar work: Leonardo Helicopters, Cummins

Planning as a Service

PaaS model accelerates Boeing integration planning capabilities while building internal capacity for complex multi-program scenario planning and cost-to-serve optimization across combined entity.

AI & Analytics

Supply Risk Agent + Cost Intelligence Agent

AI-driven early warning system for supplier constraints and parts shortages, plus predictive cost analytics to anticipate and mitigate forward loss exposure across loss-making programs.

AI & Analytics

Confidence: high

Stellantis reduced US dealer inventory by 268k units but still generated €6bn negative industrial free cash flow in FY2024, with operating margins collapsing from 15.4% to 5.5%. Key Issues

Section 232 tariff exposure patented drugs

100% ad valorem duty

Default 100% tariff applies to patented pharmaceuticals and APIs effective July 31, 2026 for large pharma companies, with tiered reductions available through onshoring plans.

Capabilities Needed

Tariff scenario planningManufacturing footprint optimizationTrade compliance modeling

Compressed Phase 3 manufacturing location decisions

£300m investment acceleration

AstraZeneca announced £300 million Cambridge and Macclesfield investment in April 2026 as companies now require manufacturing location decisions during Phase 3 trials instead of post-approval.

Capabilities Needed

Network design accelerationClinical-to-commercial supply planningScenario-based capacity allocation

Capital expenditure surge manufacturing expansion

33% capex increase

Customs disruption cascading backlogs May 2026

Capabilities Needed

Cross-border trade planningCapacity & constraint managementReal-time visibility & control tower

Chronic congestion raising logistics costs

20%

COMCE reports companies absorbing up to 20% logistics cost overruns due to prolonged dwell times, yard saturation, and customs inspection delays exceeding 72 hours per container.

Capabilities Needed

Yard & dwell time optimizationDynamic throughput planningMulti-echelon inventory planning

Appointment delays amplifying supply chain risks

1.8 days

Berth wait times reached 1.8 days (highest in 2026) with vessels spending two weeks from arrival to departure indicating severe operational backlog post-disruption.

Capabilities Needed

Predictive demand sensingNetwork flow optimizationCollaborative planning
Margin: +2000bps

Where the value lies

Port operators face 20% logistics cost erosion and $150m revenue leakage from customs disruption, with chronic congestion creating 1.8-day berth delays. Immediate value lies in real-time capacity optimization, customs workflow automation, and predictive throughput planning to recover margin and reduce 72-hour container inspection cycles driving supply chain instability across Mexico's busiest Pacific gateway handling 3.89m TEUs annually.

Accenture Solutions

Planning Opportunities

Platform Opportunities

Demand-Supply BalancingAgricultural S&OPPrice Volatility Management

Agricultural Supply PlanningClimate Risk ModelingMulti-Echelon Inventory Optimization

Trade Policy Scenario PlanningCost-to-Serve AnalysisExport Market Diversification Planning
Margin: +200bps

Where the value lies

With tomato production down 9% and prices up 99.2% year-over-year, Mexican food processors face severe margin compression (down 20%) and export decline (23.5% in Q1). Advanced agricultural S&OP with climate-aware demand-supply balancing, combined with tariff scenario planning and multi-echelon inventory optimization, could recover 200 bps in margins while improving supply chain resilience against continued climate and trade volatility.

Inv value$1.8bn

Margin declined 30 bps year-over-year as company invested £1bn in price reductions to maintain competitive position amid intense UK grocery price war.

Capabilities Needed

Price-Cost OptimizationPromotional PlanningMargin AnalyticsSKU Profitability Management
WC: $120mInv: -8%Margin: +40bps

Where the value lies

Sainsbury's delivered £1bn operating profit with 6.7% gross margin under severe weather and price pressure, signaling immediate need for resilient supply planning. With 40,000 hectares of supplier farmland disrupted and fresh produce gaps across stores, optimizing multi-echelon inventory and deploying AI-driven demand sensing could release $120m working capital while improving margin by 40 bps through better supplier collaboration and contingency sourcing.

Accenture Solutions

Planning Opportunities

Implement advanced S&OP with climate-risk scenario modeling and multi-sourcing strategies to mitigate weather-driven supplier disruptions and fresh produce shortages.

Platform Opportunities

Engineering change managementMulti-tier supply chain visibilityProgramme milestone planningRisk-based cost forecasting

Contract profitability trackingLabour capacity planningMaterial cost volatility management

Programme sequencing and rework productivity issues

Design maturity assessmentsBuild sequence optimizationRework impact simulation

Where the value lies

Despite Type 31 challenges, Babcock achieved 8.2% operating margin (up 70bps) and targets 9%+ medium-term with £262m free cash flow. 2% vs 3.5% prior year

Given the EBIT margin target of 7% (currently 2%), a 200+ bps margin recovery through improved S&OP, cost-to-serve optimization, and capacity right-sizing represents $2bn+ in annual profit improvement.

$3-18/barrel

Loss-making sterile manufacturing facilities SA & France

Manufacturing network optimizationCapacity planning & utilizationCost-to-serve modeling

Capabilities Needed

Demand planningScenario planningRevenue & capacity rebalancing

Working capital intensity manufacturing operations

45% WC-to-revenue ratio

Despite 193% operating cash conversion, manufacturing segment carries high inventory from seasonal API business and sterile production.

Capabilities Needed

Inventory optimizationS&OP maturitySupply-demand matching
WC: $80-120mInv: -15%Margin: +400bps

Where the value lies

Aspen can unlock $80-120m in working capital by reducing the 45% WC-to-revenue ratio through better demand-supply synchronization across sterile manufacturing. Restructuring of loss-making SA and France facilities presents 400bps margin recovery opportunity as ZAR 695m one-time costs convert to run-rate savings by FY2027, restoring Manufacturing EBITDA from current ZAR 208m (down 85% YoY) toward historical R2bn+ levels.

Planning Opportunities

Integrated S&OP to synchronize Commercial Pharma (4% growth) with reshaped Manufacturing capacity and eliminate demand-supply mismatches causing 85% EBITDA decline.

Target Operating Model

Platform Opportunities

Margin compression and profitability collapse

Profitability Analytics by SKU/ChannelRevenue Management & PricingProduct Portfolio Rationalization

Immediate opportunities include further working capital release from optimized inventory positioning (268k units already reduced but more efficiency possible), S&OP process redesign to prevent future overcapacity mismatches, and 150-200 bps margin recovery through product mix optimization and supply network rationalization across 14 brands.

Critical mineral shortages China export controls

$2bn tariff impact 2025

Supply Chain VisibilityMulti-Sourcing StrategyTransportation Management

$19.5bn charge

Ford took $19.5bn in charges (mostly Q4 2025 and 2026) pivoting away from large EVs toward hybrids with $8.5bn asset impairment.

Capabilities Needed

Demand PlanningInventory OptimizationProduction Scheduling

Plant shutdowns production halts material availability

3 weeks downtime

Chicago plant halted Explorer production for weeks; day-to-day operations managing hand-to-mouth rare earth component supply.

Capabilities Needed

Real-Time Inventory TrackingSupplier CollaborationRisk Management

Where the value lies

Ford faces $2bn annual tariff costs and 3-week plant shutdowns from supply chain fragility requiring autonomous supply chain visibility and multi-modal transportation optimization. Digital twin scenario planning could reduce critical mineral exposure risk by 40% while improving supplier diversification and production continuity across 60+ plants globally.

Accenture Fulfillment Solutions

🏭 Autonomous Warehousing

Autonomous WMS for managing critical component inventory across 60+ plants with real-time visibility into rare earth material levels and automated replenishment triggers.

🚚 Autonomous Transportation

AI-powered TMS to optimize multi-sourcing transportation routes for critical minerals, manage tariff impacts, and enable real-time carrier selection during China export control disruptions.

📦 Autonomous Order Mgmt

Orchestrate production orders across Ford Pro, Blue, and Model e segments with dynamic allocation based on component availability and demand shifts during scaling back of EV production.

🤖 Agentic AI & Digital Twin

AI agents simulate China export control scenarios, predict rare earth shortages 90 days ahead, and autonomously trigger multi-sourcing protocols to prevent $500M+ plant shutdown costs.

Confidence: high

Logistics & Distribution · $13.3bn

Large Enterprise (>$3B) Transportation

HIGH
 

Vancouver rail dwell delays adding 2-3 weeks to intermodal transit times in Q1 2026

Metropolitan Logistics (April 2026)

KPIs

Freight cost61.7% rev
  

Key Issues

Vancouver rail dwell times 15-20 days

$350M tariff impact

Vessel bunching and railcar shortages at Vancouver port creating severe congestion across east-west corridors in Q1 2026.

Capabilities Needed

Rail Network OptimizationAsset Visibility & TrackingPredictive Analytics

Winter operations extending transit 3-7 days

1% car velocity decline

Winter restrictions forcing shorter trains and speed reductions across network increasing dwell and reducing throughput.

Capabilities Needed

Dynamic Capacity PlanningWeather-Adaptive OperationsNetwork Digital Twin

Chassis shortages creating detention fees

C$500M capex reduction

Capital spending cut to C$2.8B for 2026 while facing equipment shortages at inland terminals generating customer penalties.

Capabilities Needed

Equipment Pool OptimizationIntermodal Asset ManagementCost-to-Serve Analytics

Where the value lies

CN faces $350M+ tariff impact and severe Vancouver port dwell times of 15-20 days vs target 4-5 days, directly threatening operating ratio improvement from 61.7% to target sub-60%. Digital twin-enabled network optimization could reduce dwell by 10-15 days, cut winter transit penalties by 3-7 days, and eliminate $50M+ in detention/demurrage fees while improving fuel efficiency 3%+ and car velocity 6%.

Accenture Fulfillment Solutions

🏭 Autonomous Warehousing

Optimize inland terminal and transload facility operations to reduce chassis detention and improve container throughput during port congestion events.

🚚 Autonomous Transportation

Dynamic railcar allocation and real-time network optimization to eliminate 15-20 day dwell times and manage winter operating restrictions across 20,000-mile network.

📦 Autonomous Order Mgmt

Unified intermodal order orchestration across rail-truck-ocean modes to provide shippers real-time visibility and proactive rerouting during Vancouver congestion.

🤖 Agentic AI & Digital Twin

AI agents simulate vessel bunching scenarios, predict dwell time spikes 7-14 days ahead, dynamically reallocate 50,000+ railcars, and optimize train formations to reduce 15-20 day dwell to 4-5 days.

Confidence: high

Chassis shortage at inland terminals

$40-75/day detention fees

Containers held on railcars when customer chassis unavailable trigger asset use and storage fees during peak season.

Capabilities Needed

Asset VisibilityPredictive AnalyticsYard Management

Winter transit time extensions

3-7 days added

Speed restrictions and shorter train lengths on east-west corridors reduce rail capacity and extend delivery windows.

Capabilities Needed

Network OptimizationDynamic RoutingCapacity Planning

Operating ratio pressure from headwinds

70 bps OR increase

Q1 2026 operating ratio increased to 66.0% from 65.3% despite volume growth and improved network metrics.

Capabilities Needed

Cost AnalyticsResource OptimizationPerformance Management

Where the value lies

CPKC can recover 3-7 day transit time losses and eliminate $40-75/day detention fees through intelligent asset visibility and predictive network management. Reducing operating ratio by 120 bps (matching Q4 2025 record) translates to approximately $45M annual savings on $3.7B quarterly revenue.

Accenture Fulfillment Solutions

🏭 Autonomous Warehousing

Terminal yard management to optimize container-chassis matching, reduce dwell time, and prevent asset use fees at inland intermodal facilities.

🚚 Autonomous Transportation

Multi-modal network optimization to dynamically route around winter speed restrictions and balance chassis pool allocation across terminals.

📦 Autonomous Order Mgmt

End-to-end shipment visibility and proactive customer notification when weather or equipment constraints impact delivery commitments.

🤖 Agentic AI & Digital Twin

Digital twin simulates winter operating plans and chassis demand surges to prescribe preemptive capacity adjustments and reduce detention exposure.

Key Issues

Legacy cargo technology infrastructure obsolescence

$259M Q1 cargo revenue

Air Canada selected Cargospot neo in June 2026 to replace legacy systems and modernize operations after competitive tender.

Capabilities Needed

Cloud Platform MigrationAPI IntegrationChange Management

Weaker international transborder freight yields

3.5% YoY growth

Q1 2026 cargo revenue grew only 3.5% to C$259M despite volume increases, offset by yield pressure in international markets.

Capabilities Needed

Revenue ManagementNetwork OptimizationDynamic Pricing

Trade policy uncertainty reshaping flows

14% corporate revenue exposure

Geopolitical pressures and trade uncertainty affecting freight routing decisions and international cargo demand patterns.

Capabilities Needed

Scenario PlanningRoute OptimizationRisk Analytics

Where the value lies

Air Canada Cargo can unlock $31-39M annual value (12-15% of C$259M quarterly cargo revenue) through autonomous freight operations and real-time visibility enabled by Cargospot neo platform modernization. Digital twin and AI agents optimizing route planning, yield management, and freighter utilization across 6 Boeing 767 dedicated aircraft can address international yield compression and capitalize on 18% sixth-freedom revenue growth.

Accenture Fulfillment Solutions

🏭 Autonomous Warehousing

Cargo warehouse and handling operations across hubs require WMS integration with Cargospot neo for real-time inventory visibility and automated sortation.

🚚 Autonomous Transportation

TMS optimization of 6 freighter aircraft routes, belly cargo capacity across 200+ destinations, and intermodal connections to maximize yield and asset utilization.

📦 Autonomous Order Mgmt

Unified order orchestration across cargo channels (freighter, belly, trucking partnerships) with real-time booking, tracking and customer portal integration to Cargospot neo.

🤖 Agentic AI & Digital Twin

AI agents analyzing real-time trade flows, fuel costs, and capacity to dynamically optimize freighter deployment, pricing, and network routing addressing international yield weakness.

Confidence: high
